title: *GOV* IT Quality Assurance Specialist
description:
QA Specialist

We are seeking an experienced QA Specialist to lead functional, end-to-end, and automation testing initiatives. The ideal candidate is proficient in Selenium, API testing, and Agile methodologies, with strong defect management skills and hands-on experience in CI/CD environments.

  • Working Hour: Mon-Fri
  • Working Location: Central
  • Remuneration Package: Up to $6,500 (basic) + AWS

Responsibilities:

  • Develop comprehensive test cases for various test types, including Functional Testing and End-to-End Testing.
  • Execute test cases and closely monitor the testing progress to ensure timely completion.
  • Experience in Automation Testing (Selenium)
  • Report test status, results, and defects to the relevant stakeholders.
  • Work collaboratively with users and stakeholders to identify areas for improvement in test coverage.
  • Provide guidance and coaching to users to enhance their understanding of testing processes and techniques.
  • Familiarity with defects and test management tools, as well as automated testing and Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CICD) processes and Cucumber
  • Experience in API testing (Postman), Performance Testing, or Security Testing will be considered favorably.
  • Exhibit curiosity and a proactive approach to problem-solving, showing the ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Experience in Agile Methodology - BDD Framework & Scrum

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields.
  • A minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in developing test cases and conducting test execution.
  • Proficient in Functional Testing and End-to-End Testing methodologies.
  • Knowledge of defects and test management tools is desirable.
  • Familiarity with automated testing and CICD processes will be a bonus.
  • Experience in API testing, Performance Testing, or Security Testing will be considered a valuable asset.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

Contact you about potential opportunities.

Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Aloysius Tan Sheng Rong - R22110441
ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
